how_to_approve: Review every rule and rationale. To approve, re-run with approvals={"rules": {"approver": "<your name>", "sha256": "8864cc9aa193523c6adacd0631a648ab267aab7ff44d92a10cbe44f26aa7245c"}}. The hash binds the approval to exactly this draft.
